mano_cua.result_summary: 发现 SSR Hydration 不匹配 bug：StackBlitz iframe 的 theme 参数服务端渲染为 theme=system，客户端期望为 theme=light，导致 Vue hydration attribute mismatch 警告。iframe 存在但内容因 WebSocket 连接失败（wss://stackblitz.com/cable）未能加载。无 COOP/COEP 错误。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: SSR Hydration mismatch bug found: StackBlitz iframe theme param rendered as theme=system on server but expected theme=light on client, causing Vue hydration attribute mismatch. iframe exists but content fails to load due to WebSocket connection failure. No COOP/COEP errors.
